title: Flavorful Fresh Croatian Polenta
description: A refreshing and energizing Croatian polenta dish, infused with the delicate flavor of rose water and the crunch of tadka.
instructions: Combine polenta cornmeal and water in a large pot, whisking to avoid lumps.
Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat, then reduce the heat to low and cook for 20 minutes, stirring frequently.
In a small pan, heat coconut oil over medium heat and sauté the chopped onion until translucent.
Add the minced garlic to the pan and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Stir the tadka spice blend and salt into the onion mixture.
Once the polenta is cooked, stir in the onion mixture and rose water.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the polenta has absorbed the flavors.
Transfer the polenta to a serving dish and garnish with chopped fresh parsley.
